project.name: Synth
project.summary: Universal AST processing and language-tooling monorepo for the @sylphx/synth* package family, parser packages, AST tooling, WASM parser bridges, and product-neutral Synth contracts for Rust-native MCP consumers.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/synth* package family
surfaces.description: Public parser, AST, tooling, documentation, and WASM package surfaces.

surfaces.name: Rust/WASM parser bridges
surfaces.description: Rust parser bridge sources that build WASM parser packages consumed by Synth packages.

surfaces.name: Repository README
surfaces.description: Public package-family overview, installation, usage, benchmarks, and project-control entry point.

surfaces.name: Documentation site
surfaces.description: VitePress guide, API references, examples, and package documentation.

surfaces.name: MCP family AST foundation roadmap
surfaces.description: Roadmap for serving Rust-native MCP products with @sylphx/synth* contracts, fixtures, benchmarks, and Rust/WASM bridge criteria without claiming SylphxAI/ast ownership.

surfaces.name: CI/admission
surfaces.description: ADR-29 admission, Rust/Bun validation, project-control tests,.

surfaces.name: Release
surfaces.description: Main-branch release workflow calling the shared Sylphx Changesets release workflow.

surfaces.name: Project control plane
surfaces.description: Human project identity, boundary, lifecycle, package surfaces, and delivery proof.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: install
commands.purpose: Install workspace dependencies without lockfile drift.

commands.name: validate
commands.purpose: Run the current CI validation baseline: lint, single-concurrency build, typecheck, and Bun tests.

commands.name: test:project-control
commands.purpose: Verify neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, CI gate, and release caller boundary.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral project.manifest retained as optional metadata. GroundAtlas package dogfood retired (Control Plane ADR-0014). .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog.
